actionCalls.name: Convert_Selected_Row_to_APEX_Class
actionCalls.label: Convert Selected Row to APEX Class

value.stringValue: Account has DrChrono Id, calling Autolaunch_API_Call_to_Dr_Chrono Flow
Cancel Selected on Found Patients Screen
Selected create new patient, Autolaunch - API Call to Dr Chrono starting
DrChrono Id {!Convert_Selected_Row_to_APEX_Class.patientRecord.id} parsed from selection and assigned
Screenflow - Manual Sync DrChrono Patient Record Flow Started

actionCalls.name: Log_Found_Record_with_existing_drChrono_Id
actionCalls.label: Log Found Record with existing drChrono Id

value.stringValue: Found Record with existing drChrono Id
Missing required fields. Going to Ask for Required Fields screen
No records found, going to create patient subflow
No DrChrono Id, calling drChrono_SearchPatient apex
{!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName} Initiated Manual Sync DrChrono Patient Record

decisions.description: Instead of having several updates for different reasons, we compiled them all within the assignments and will use this decision to see if we need to update the account or not.
decisions.name: Do_We_Need_To_Update_Account
decisions.label: Do We Need To Update Account

decisions.description: An Account must have a main practitioner assigned as this is linked to the Practice Group Id
decisions.name: Does_Account_Have_All_Required_Fields
decisions.label: Does Account Have All Required Fields

decisions.description: If the Account has a DrChrono Id then we just need to sync the record but if not then we need to search for an existing patient
decisions.name: Does_Account_Have_DrChrono_Id
decisions.label: Does Account Have DrChrono Id

rules.name: Found_Record_With_Existing_DrChrono_Id
rules.label: Found Record With Existing DrChrono Id

decisions.name: Is_Main_Practitioner_Assigned_a_Practice_Group
decisions.label: Is Main Practitioner Assigned a Practice Group

Flow.description: This screenflow will manually sync the DrChrono patient record. If the patient exists, it will do an update; if not then it will create a new patient.
Flow.interviewLabel: Screenflow - Manual Sync DrChrono Patient Record {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Screenflow - Manual Sync DrChrono Patient Record

fields.name: txtNoPracticeGroupAssigned
fields.fieldText: {!Get_Account_Record.Main_Practitioner__r.Name} has not been assigned a Practice Group, and you are unable to sync this account to DrChrono until the Main Practioner is assigned a Practice Group.

fields.name: txtErrorFoundExistingDrChronoId
fields.fieldText:
Found Existing Patient Account with the same DrChrono Id: {!dtFoundPatients.selectedRowKeyValue}


Potential Duplicate Account:

https://10xhealth.lightning.force.com/{!Search_For_Existing_DrChrono_Id.Id}

fields.name: textLeft
fields.fieldText:
First Name: {!Get_Account_Record.FirstName}

Last Name: {!Get_Account_Record.LastName}

Email: {!Get_Account_Record.PersonEmail}

fields.name: txtRight
fields.fieldText:
Date of Birth: {!Get_Account_Record.DateOfBirth__c}

Gender: {!Get_Account_Record.Gender__c}

fields.name: helperText
fields.fieldText: ﻿In order to link a record, choose at least one row.

value.stringValue: [{"label":"Link DrChrono Patient to Salesforce","value":"Link DrChrono Patient to Salesforce","iconPosition":"left","variant":"brand","iconName":"utility:link","index":0}]

fields.name: txtNoRecordsFound
fields.fieldText: No Records Are Found. Please create a new patient.

subflows.description: The Subflow will handle if there needs to be an update or a new record created.
subflows.name: Call_DrChrono_API
subflows.label: Call DrChrono API
